action_items.action: Share EVE logo information with Chloe Christie for the Instagram Headers Widget (NZ A/B test). Chloe directly tagged you on 16 Apr: '@Mike Pett to share logo information from EVE'. Vic Dadson also tagged to update tracking. Still outstanding.

Unblock / escalate Operator List Redesign (GDCU-8619). Blocked since 15 Apr awaiting feedback from Michael Butlin. Chloe Christie confirmed the block; Ciara Carroll has delivered design iterations and tagged you and Chloe for review. Michael Butlin previously commented 'I can't get this to work' — may need a direct conversation to resolve.

Review and provide feedback on the Global Strategy Hub / Sub Hub Refinements (GDCU-8823). Chloe Christie tagged you directly on 20 Apr: '@Mike Pett @Miguel Migneco please review the below and share any feedback.' QA has verified the implementation. Waiting on Erica Schembri's GX article migration confirmation before release — your feedback is needed in parallel.

Product sign-off on Image Carousel Shortcode (GDCU-8836). Newly arrived In Product today. Robin John QA-verified all acceptance criteria: shortcode scrollable on desktop + mobile, clickable links functioning, Genesis integration confirmed. You are a named stakeholder. Test page: https://inf2.gambling.com/shortcodes-test-page

Product sign-off on Remove Prediction Markets Breadcrumb — US (GDCU-8844). Newly arrived In Product today. Sanja Budic deployed to qa18; Robin John verified on desktop and mobile. Breadcrumb now correctly shows 'Gambling.com > Prediction Market Apps'. Simple approval needed.

Review CA/FR Casino Page Oplist Redesign designs (GDCU-8801). Ciara shared updated card designs on 6 Apr. Diana Thurmann has signed off on initial mockups. Josh Smith asked Ciara to progress to a full dev-ready design — your input as stakeholder would help unblock that progression.

NEW: Gambling.com Design System (GDCU-8893) started today by Ciara Carroll — marked Highest priority and In Progress. No description details available yet but given it's highest priority and Ciara is your direct report, worth scheduling a brief alignment call.

Monitor: Desktop PSI blocked by geo-redirect race condition (GDCU-8869) — High priority, all geos affected. Sanja Budic actively working on it (updated 13:35 today). Technical issue: inline redirect fires before isGooglePageSpeedInsightsAgent() is defined, blocking PageSpeed scoring. No action needed from Mike yet but worth awareness.

needs_input.summary: New Global Strategy Hub / Sub Hub Refinements
needs_input.context: Chloe Christie tagged @Mike Pett directly on 20 Apr asking for review and feedback. QA has fully verified the implementation (carousels, grid pagination, video sections, search, navigation). Currently held pending confirmation from Erica Schembri that GX articles are ready to migrate. Your review feedback is needed now in parallel to unblock the release.

Moved to In Product today. Robin John fully verified: scrollable on desktop and mobile, clickable links functional (pageType + pageCPK), Genesis integration confirmed. Mike is a named stakeholder. Needs product review and approval to release.

needs_input.context: Moved to In Product today. Sanja deployed to qa18; Robin John verified on desktop and mobile — breadcrumb now correctly reads 'Gambling.com > Prediction Market Apps'. Stakeholders: Michael Butlin, Chloe Christie, Josh Smith. Straightforward approval needed to release.

Josh Smith has asked Ciara to progress to a full dev-ready design. Mike's input as stakeholder would help confirm direction and unblock Ciara moving to dev-ready.

BLOCKED since 15 Apr. Chloe Christie confirmed: 'Blocked while awaiting feedback from @Michael Butlin'. Ciara has delivered 3 design iterations (shared as attachment — open in Chrome, go to 'Solutions 02' tab). Gabriel Cornoiu also reviewed and posted a screenshot asking if what he saw was correct. Michael Butlin previously couldn't open the file. Mike should chase Michael Butlin directly to unblock this as it is holding back the full oplist redesign programme.
